title: tracing -- Structured Diagnostics and Logging
description: A framework for instrumenting Rust programs to collect structured, event-based diagnostic information. Unlike simple logging, tracing supports spans (representing units of work) that give context to events. Essential for async and distributed systems.

commonPatterns.title: Instrument async functions
Structured fields

whenToUse: In any application or library where you need logging, diagnostics, or performance tracing. Especially valuable for async programs where traditional logging loses context. Replaces log + env_logger for new projects.
alternatives: log + env_logger (simpler, widespread), slog (structured logging), log4rs (log4j-style). For distributed tracing: tracing + tracing-opentelemetry exports to Jaeger/Zipkin.
